name: hcportal_updateFcmToken
description: Updates the FCM (Firebase Cloud Messaging) push notification token for a device after the browser has refreshed its token. Also updates device version, build number, and last login timestamp.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: Device ID whose record should be updated. Must be non-NULL; returns an error if NULL.

parameters.name: publicHasherId
parameters.description: Auth: public hasher ID of the authenticated user. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth with @fcmToken as the paramString.

parameters.name: fcmToken
parameters.description: New FCM push notification token to store for the device. Narrowed from NVARCHAR(1000) in HC5 to NVARCHAR(500) in HC6 to match the table column and ValidatePortalAuth paramString width.

parameters.name: buildNumber
parameters.description: Build number of the portal application to be stored with the device record.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Version number of the portal application to be stored with the device record.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any validation, auth, or runtime error. Short-circuits on first error.

rowsets.name: SuccessResult
rowsets.description: Returned after successfully updating the device record.

sideEffects: UPDATE HC.Device (FcmToken, Version, BuildNumber, LastLogin) for the matching deviceId. Wrapped in a transaction.
breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning
